testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_41] Ensure no hard coded AWS access key and secret key exists in provider

[NONE][CKV_AWS_234] Verify logging preference for ACM certificates

[NONE][CKV_AWS_133] Ensure that RDS instances has backup policy

[NONE][CKV_AWS_388] Ensure AWS Aurora PostgreSQL is not exposed to local file read vulnerability
[NONE][CKV_AWS_211] Ensure RDS uses a modern CaCert
[NONE][CKV_AWS_157] Ensure that RDS instances have Multi-AZ enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_354] Ensure RDS Performance Insights are encrypted using KMS CMKs
[NONE][CKV_AWS_16] Ensure all data stored in the RDS is securely encrypted at rest

[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role

[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services

[NONE][CKV_AWS_168] Ensure SQS queue policy is not public by only allowing specific services or principals to access it

failure.message: Ensure AWS CloudFront web distribution has geo restriction enabled

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_192] Ensure WAF prevents message lookup in Log4j2. See CVE-2021-44228 aka log4jshell

failure.message: Ensure WAF prevents message lookup in Log4j2. See CVE-2021-44228 aka log4jshell

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_wafv2_web_acl.main File: /04_security_waf.tf: 5-85 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-waf-prevents-message-lookup-in-log4j2
Code lines for this resource are too many. Please use IDE of your choice to review the file.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_237] Ensure Create before destroy for API Gateway

failure.message: Ensure Create before destroy for API Gateway

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_120] Ensure API Gateway caching is enabled

failure.message: Ensure API Gateway caching is enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_stage.prod File: /06_api_gateway.tf: 22-39 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-api-gateway-caching-is-enabled
22 | resource "aws_api_gateway_stage" "prod" { 23 | deployment_id = aws_api_gateway_deployment.main.id 24 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.main.id 25 | stage_name = var.environment 26 | 27 | # Throttling general de la API (100 req/min ya filtrado antes por WAF) 28 | xray_tracing_enabled = true 29 | 30 | access_log_settings { 31 | destination_arn = aws_cloudwatch_log_group.api_gw_logs.arn 32 | format = jsonencode({ 33 | requestId = "$context.requestId" 34 | ip = "$context.identity.sourceIp" 35 | status = "$context.status" 36 | latency = "$context.responseLatency" 37 | }) 38 | } 39 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_225] Ensure API Gateway method setting caching is enabled

failure.message: Ensure API Gateway method setting caching is enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_method_settings.prod File: /06_api_gateway.tf: 41-52 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-aws-api-gateway-method-settings-enable-caching
41 | resource "aws_api_gateway_method_settings" "prod" { 42 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.main.id 43 | stage_name = aws_api_gateway_stage.prod.stage_name 44 | method_path = "*/*" 45 | 46 | settings { 47 | throttling_rate_limit = 100 48 | throttling_burst_limit = 50 49 | logging_level = "INFO" 50 | metrics_enabled = true 51 | } 52 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

failure.message: Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.api_gw_logs File: /06_api_gateway.tf: 68-72 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-338
68 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "api_gw_logs" { 69 | name = "/aws/apigateway/${var.project_name}" 70 | retention_in_days = 90 71 | kms_key_id = aws_kms_key.main.arn 72 | }

failure.message: Ensure AWS Lambda function is configured to validate code-signing

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.sync_lambda_logs["auth"] File: /07_lambdas_sync.tf: 59-65 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-338
59 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "sync_lambda_logs" { 60 | for_each = local.sync_lambdas 61 | 62 | name = "/aws/lambda/${var.project_name}-${each.key}" 63 | retention_in_days = 90 64 | kms_key_id = aws_kms_key.main.arn 65 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_161] Ensure RDS database has IAM authentication enabled

failure.message: Ensure RDS database has IAM authentication enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_db_instance.postgres File: /08_rds.tf: 14-44 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/ensure-rds-database-has-iam-authentication-enabled
14 | resource "aws_db_instance" "postgres" { 15 | identifier = "${var.project_name}-db" 16 | engine = "postgres" 17 | engine_version = "15.4" 18 | instance_class = "db.t3.medium" 19 | 20 | allocated_storage = 50 21 | storage_type = "gp3" 22 | storage_encrypted = true 23 | kms_key_id = aws_kms_key.main.arn 24 | 25 | db_name = "pokiecat" 26 | username = var.db_username 27 | password = var.db_password 28 | 29 | multi_az = true 30 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.main.name 31 | vpc_security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.rds_sg.id] 32 | publicly_accessible = false 33 | 34 | backup_retention_period = 7 35 | backup_window = "02:00-03:00" 36 | deletion_protection = true 37 | skip_final_snapshot = false 38 | 39 | enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports = ["postgresql", "upgrade"] 40 | 41 | tags = { 42 | Name = "${var.project_name}-rds" 43 | } 44 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_226] Ensure DB instance gets all minor upgrades automatically

failure.message: Ensure DB instance gets all minor upgrades automatically

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_db_instance.postgres File: /08_rds.tf: 14-44 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-aws-db-instance-gets-all-minor-upgrades-automatically
14 | resource "aws_db_instance" "postgres" { 15 | identifier = "${var.project_name}-db" 16 | engine = "postgres" 17 | engine_version = "15.4" 18 | instance_class = "db.t3.medium" 19 | 20 | allocated_storage = 50 21 | storage_type = "gp3" 22 | storage_encrypted = true 23 | kms_key_id = aws_kms_key.main.arn 24 | 25 | db_name = "pokiecat" 26 | username = var.db_username 27 | password = var.db_password 28 | 29 | multi_az = true 30 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.main.name 31 | vpc_security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.rds_sg.id] 32 | publicly_accessible = false 33 | 34 | backup_retention_period = 7 35 | backup_window = "02:00-03:00" 36 | deletion_protection = true 37 | skip_final_snapshot = false 38 | 39 | enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports = ["postgresql", "upgrade"] 40 | 41 | tags = { 42 | Name = "${var.project_name}-rds" 43 | } 44 | }

Resource: aws_cloudtrail.main File: /11_security_secrets.tf: 59-71 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-aws-cloudtrail-defines-an-sns-topic
59 | resource "aws_cloudtrail" "main" { 60 | name = "${var.project_name}-trail" 61 | s3_bucket_name = aws_s3_bucket.cloudtrail_logs.id 62 | include_global_service_events = true 63 | is_multi_region_trail = true 64 | enable_log_file_validation = true 65 | kms_key_id = aws_kms_key.main.arn 66 | 67 | event_selector { 68 | read_write_type = "All" 69 | include_management_events = true 70 | } 71 | }

failure.message: Ensure S3 lifecycle configuration sets period for aborting failed uploads

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_355] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

failure.message: Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_iam_role_policy.lambda_basic File: /12_iam.tf: 19-66 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-355
19 | resource "aws_iam_role_policy" "lambda_basic" { 20 | name = "${var.project_name}-lambda-basic-policy" 21 | role = aws_iam_role.lambda_exec.id 22 | 23 | policy = jsonencode({ 24 | Version = "2012-10-17" 25 | Statement = [ 26 | { 27 | Sid = "Logs" 28 | Effect = "Allow" 29 | Action = [ 30 | "logs:CreateLogGroup", 31 | "logs:CreateLogStream", 32 | "logs:PutLogEvents" 33 | ] 34 | Resource = "arn:aws:logs:${var.aws_region}:*:*" 35 | }, 36 | { 37 | Sid = "VpcAccess" 38 | Effect = "Allow" 39 | Action = [ 40 | "ec2:CreateNetworkInterface", 41 | "ec2:DescribeNetworkInterfaces", 42 | "ec2:DeleteNetworkInterface" 43 | ] 44 | Resource = "*" 45 | }, 46 | { 47 | Sid = "ReadDbSecret" 48 | Effect = "Allow" 49 | Action = ["secretsmanager:GetSecretValue"] 50 | Resource = aws_secretsmanager_secret.db_credentials.arn 51 | }, 52 | { 53 | Sid = "SendToOrdersQueue" 54 | Effect = "Allow" 55 | Action = ["sqs:SendMessage"] 56 | Resource = aws_sqs_queue.orders.arn 57 | }, 58 | { 59 | Sid = "SesSendEmail" 60 | Effect = "Allow" 61 | Action = ["ses:SendEmail", "ses:SendRawEmail"] 62 | Resource = "*" 63 | } 64 | ] 65 | }) 66 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_290] Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints

failure.message: Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_iam_role_policy.lambda_basic File: /12_iam.tf: 19-66 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-290
19 | resource "aws_iam_role_policy" "lambda_basic" { 20 | name = "${var.project_name}-lambda-basic-policy" 21 | role = aws_iam_role.lambda_exec.id 22 | 23 | policy = jsonencode({ 24 | Version = "2012-10-17" 25 | Statement = [ 26 | { 27 | Sid = "Logs" 28 | Effect = "Allow" 29 | Action = [ 30 | "logs:CreateLogGroup", 31 | "logs:CreateLogStream", 32 | "logs:PutLogEvents" 33 | ] 34 | Resource = "arn:aws:logs:${var.aws_region}:*:*" 35 | }, 36 | { 37 | Sid = "VpcAccess" 38 | Effect = "Allow" 39 | Action = [ 40 | "ec2:CreateNetworkInterface", 41 | "ec2:DescribeNetworkInterfaces", 42 | "ec2:DeleteNetworkInterface" 43 | ] 44 | Resource = "*" 45 | }, 46 | { 47 | Sid = "ReadDbSecret" 48 | Effect = "Allow" 49 | Action = ["secretsmanager:GetSecretValue"] 50 | Resource = aws_secretsmanager_secret.db_credentials.arn 51 | }, 52 | { 53 | Sid = "SendToOrdersQueue" 54 | Effect = "Allow" 55 | Action = ["sqs:SendMessage"] 56 | Resource = aws_sqs_queue.orders.arn 57 | }, 58 | { 59 | Sid = "SesSendEmail" 60 | Effect = "Allow" 61 | Action = ["ses:SendEmail", "ses:SendRawEmail"] 62 | Resource = "*" 63 | } 64 | ] 65 | }) 66 | }

failure.message: Ensure RDS instance with copy tags to snapshots is enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_db_instance.postgres File: /08_rds.tf: 14-44 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-2-60
14 | resource "aws_db_instance" "postgres" { 15 | identifier = "${var.project_name}-db" 16 | engine = "postgres" 17 | engine_version = "15.4" 18 | instance_class = "db.t3.medium" 19 | 20 | allocated_storage = 50 21 | storage_type = "gp3" 22 | storage_encrypted = true 23 | kms_key_id = aws_kms_key.main.arn 24 | 25 | db_name = "pokiecat" 26 | username = var.db_username 27 | password = var.db_password 28 | 29 | multi_az = true 30 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.main.name 31 | vpc_security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.rds_sg.id] 32 | publicly_accessible = false 33 | 34 | backup_retention_period = 7 35 | backup_window = "02:00-03:00" 36 | deletion_protection = true 37 | skip_final_snapshot = false 38 | 39 | enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports = ["postgresql", "upgrade"] 40 | 41 | tags = { 42 | Name = "${var.project_name}-rds" 43 | } 44 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudtrail.main File: /11_security_secrets.tf: 59-71 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/ensure-cloudtrail-trails-are-integrated-with-cloudwatch-logs
59 | resource "aws_cloudtrail" "main" { 60 | name = "${var.project_name}-trail" 61 | s3_bucket_name = aws_s3_bucket.cloudtrail_logs.id 62 | include_global_service_events = true 63 | is_multi_region_trail = true 64 | enable_log_file_validation = true 65 | kms_key_id = aws_kms_key.main.arn 66 | 67 | event_selector { 68 | read_write_type = "All" 69 | include_management_events = true 70 | } 71 | }

Resource: aws_api_gateway_stage.prod File: /06_api_gateway.tf: 22-39 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-2-51
22 | resource "aws_api_gateway_stage" "prod" { 23 | deployment_id = aws_api_gateway_deployment.main.id 24 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.main.id 25 | stage_name = var.environment 26 | 27 | # Throttling general de la API (100 req/min ya filtrado antes por WAF) 28 | xray_tracing_enabled = true 29 | 30 | access_log_settings { 31 | destination_arn = aws_cloudwatch_log_group.api_gw_logs.arn 32 | format = jsonencode({ 33 | requestId = "$context.requestId" 34 | ip = "$context.identity.sourceIp" 35 | status = "$context.status" 36 | latency = "$context.responseLatency" 37 | }) 38 | } 39 | }
